key: Good evening and welcome. Tonight the starter of the day is fresh tomato soup. The main course is grilled fish with vegetables, and our vegetarian option is the vegetable pasta. For dessert, we have chocolate cake, and a carrot cake, which contains nuts. Please tell your waiter about any allergy. Enjoy your meal.
text: Good evening and welcome. Tonight the starter of the day is fresh tomato soup. The main course is grilled fish with vegetables, and our vegetarian option is the vegetable pasta. For dessert, we have chocolate cake, and a carrot cake, which contains nuts. Please tell your waiter about any allergy. Enjoy your meal.
